hub.title: Condominium Hub
hub.noCondominiums: No condominiums found. Please create one to get started.

createForm.title: Create Condominium
createForm.name: Name*
createForm.createError: An error occurred while creating the condominium. Please try again later.

createStructure.title: Add Structure
createStructure.description: Define a new building, tower or block within the condominium to manage its specific units and settings.
createStructure.noStructuresAddedDescription: Divide your complex into Towers, Blocks, or Sectors to keep things organized.
createStructure.structureAlreadyExists: A structure with name {{name}} already exists. Please choose a different name.
createStructure.deleteStructureAlertMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the structure "{{name}}"?
createStructure.structureNotFound: Structure not found. Please try again.
createStructure.propertyAlreadyExists: A unit with number {{number}} already exists in {{structure}}. Please choose a different number.
createStructure.creationFailed: Failed to create structure. Please try again.
createStructure.noStructuresToCreate: No structures to create. Please add at least one structure before proceeding.
createStructure.continueWithoutValidFeeMessage: Do you want to continue without a valid total ownership fee? You can adjust the fees later.

structuresList.title: Condominium Structures
structuresList.description: Define the primary structures within your condominium to help organize units.
structuresList.addAtLeastOneStructure: Please add at least one structure to continue.

createProperty.noPropertiesAddedDescription: Start adding units to your structures to manage them effectively.
createProperty.deletePropertyAlertMessage: Are you sure you want to delete unit {{number}}
createProperty.description: Define condo properties, such as apartments, commercial spaces, or parking spots, and assign them to their corresponding structures.

setUp.title: How do you want to create your condominium?
setUp.subtitle: Select the method that best suits your needs to start organizing your property.
setUp.simpleCreationDescription: Create structures and properties one by one manually. Ideal for small condominiums or specific adjustments.
setUp.massiveCreationDescription: Define naming rules and generate multiple towers and units in a few steps. The fastest option for large complexes.
setUp.aiAssistantCreationDescription: Chat with our AI to describe your condominium and let us configure the structure for you. Perfect for those who prefer a guided and intelligent approach.

auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.userNotFound: No account found with that email. Please check your email or register for a new account.

signUp.signUpError: An error occurred during sign up.

forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.resetPasswordError: An error occurred while trying to reset your password. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.resetPasswordSuccess: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

updatePassword.title: Update Password
updatePassword.updatePasswordError: An error occurred while trying to update your password. Please try again later.
updatePassword.updatePasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated successfully.

authError.signUpError: An error occurred during sign up.
authError.signInError: An error occurred during sign in.
authError.emailInUse: This email is already in use. Please use a different email.
authError.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
authError.userNotFound: No account found with that email. Please check your email or register for a new account.
authError.samePassword: The new password cannot be the same as the previous one. Please choose a different password.
authError.emailNotConfirmed: The email has not been confirmed. Please check your inbox to confirm your email.
authError.userAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in or use a different email to register.
